command.switch_to_quick_slot: Switch to session in quick slot {{slot}}
command.diff_toggle_view: Toggle diff viewer split or unified view
command.warp_desc: Change the workspace for the session

dialog.confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
dialog.update_available_message: A new release v{{version}} is available. Would you like to update now?
dialog.update_complete_message: Successfully updated to DevEco Code v{{version}}. Please restart the application.
dialog.confirm_redo_message: Are you sure you want to restore the reverted messages?
dialog.share_confirm: Are you sure you want to share it?

permission.allow_until_restart: This will allow {{action}} until DevEco Code is restarted.
permission.allow_patterns_until_restart: This will allow the following patterns until DevEco Code is restarted
permission.keep_session_running: This keeps the session running despite repeated failures.
permission.tell_differently: Tell DevEco Code what to do differently

tip.label: ● Tip
tip.no_models: Run {highlight}/connect{/highlight} to add an AI provider and start coding
tip.0: Type {highlight}@{/highlight} followed by a filename to fuzzy search and attach files
tip.1: Start a message with {highlight}!{/highlight} to run shell commands directly (e.g., {highlight}!ls -la{/highlight})
tip.2: to cycle through Build → Goal → Plan agents
tip.3: Use {highlight}/undo{/highlight} to revert the last message and file changes
tip.4: Use {highlight}/redo{/highlight} to restore previously undone messages and file changes
tip.5: Drag and drop images or PDFs into the terminal to add them as context
tip.6: to paste images from your clipboard into the prompt
tip.7: to compose messages in your external editor
tip.8: Run {highlight}/init{/highlight} to auto-generate project rules based on your codebase
tip.9: to see and switch between available AI models
tip.11: to start a fresh conversation session
tip.12: to list, pin, and continue sessions
tip.13: in the session list to pin a session so it stays at the top
tip.14: Pinned sessions are assigned quick slots; use {highlight}{{first}}{/highlight} through {highlight}{{last}}{/highlight} to switch
tip.15: Run {highlight}/compact{/highlight} to summarize long sessions near context limits
tip.16: to save the conversation as Markdown
tip.17: to copy the assistant's last message to clipboard
tip.18: to see all available actions and commands
tip.19: Run {highlight}/connect{/highlight} to add API keys for 75+ supported LLM providers
tip.20: The leader key is {highlight}{{key}}{/highlight}; combine with other keys for quick actions
tip.21: to quickly switch between recently used models
tip.22: in a session to show or hide the sidebar panel
tip.24: to jump to the beginning of the conversation
tip.25: to jump to the most recent message
tip.26: to add newlines in your prompt
tip.27: when typing to clear the input field
tip.29: Switch to {highlight}Plan{/highlight} agent to get suggestions without making actual changes
tip.30: Use {highlight}@agent-name{/highlight} in prompts to invoke specialized subagents
tip.31: to move between parent and child sessions
tip.32: Create {highlight}deveco.json{/highlight} for server settings and {highlight}tui.json{/highlight} for TUI settings
tip.33: Place TUI settings in {highlight}~/.config/deveco/tui.json{/highlight} for global config
tip.34: Add {highlight}$schema{/highlight} to your config for autocomplete in your editor
tip.35: Configure {highlight}model{/highlight} in config to set your default model
tip.36: Override any keybind in {highlight}tui.json{/highlight} via the {highlight}keybinds{/highlight} section
tip.37: Set any keybind to {highlight}none{/highlight} to disable it completely
tip.38: Configure local or remote MCP servers in the {highlight}mcp{/highlight} config section
tip.39: Add {highlight}.md{/highlight} files to {highlight}.deveco/commands/{/highlight} to define reusable custom prompts
tip.40: Use {highlight}$ARGUMENTS{/highlight}, {highlight}$1{/highlight}, {highlight}$2{/highlight} in custom commands for dynamic input
tip.41: Use backticks in commands to inject shell output (e.g., {highlight}`git status`{/highlight})
tip.42: Add {highlight}.md{/highlight} files to {highlight}.deveco/agents/{/highlight} for specialized AI personas
tip.43: Configure per-agent permissions for {highlight}edit{/highlight}, {highlight}bash{/highlight}, and {highlight}webfetch{/highlight} tools
tip.44: Use patterns like {highlight}"git *": "allow"{/highlight} for granular bash permissions
tip.46: Configure {highlight}"git push": "ask"{/highlight} to require approval before pushing
tip.47: Set {highlight}"formatter": true{/highlight} in config to enable built-in formatters like prettier, gofmt, and ruff
tip.48: Set {highlight}"formatter": false{/highlight} in config to disable formatters enabled by another config layer
tip.49: Define custom formatter commands with file extensions in config
tip.50: Set {highlight}"lsp": true{/highlight} in config to enable built-in LSP servers for code analysis
tip.51: Create {highlight}.ts{/highlight} files in {highlight}.deveco/tools/{/highlight} to define new LLM tools
tip.52: Tool definitions can invoke scripts written in Python, Go, etc
tip.53: Add {highlight}.ts{/highlight} files to {highlight}.deveco/plugins/{/highlight} for event hooks
tip.54: Use plugins to send OS notifications when sessions complete
tip.55: Create a plugin to prevent DevEco Code from reading sensitive files
tip.57: Use {highlight}deveco --continue{/highlight} to resume the last session
tip.58: Use {highlight}deveco run -f file.ts{/highlight} to attach files via CLI
tip.59: Use {highlight}--format json{/highlight} for machine-readable output in scripts
tip.60: Run {highlight}deveco serve{/highlight} for headless API access to DevEco Code
tip.61: Use {highlight}deveco run --attach{/highlight} to connect to a running server
tip.62: Run {highlight}deveco upgrade{/highlight} to update to the latest version
tip.63: Run {highlight}deveco auth list{/highlight} to see all configured providers
tip.64: Run {highlight}deveco agent create{/highlight} for guided agent creation
tip.65: Use {highlight}"theme": "system"{/highlight} to match your terminal's colors
tip.66: Create JSON theme files in {highlight}.deveco/themes/{/highlight} directory
tip.67: Themes support dark/light variants for both modes
tip.68: Use numeric xterm color codes 0-255 in custom theme JSON
tip.69: Use {highlight}{env:VAR_NAME}{/highlight} syntax to reference environment variables in config
tip.70: Use {highlight}{file:path}{/highlight} to include file contents in config values
tip.71: Use {highlight}instructions{/highlight} in config to load additional rules files
tip.73: Configure {highlight}steps{/highlight} to limit agentic iterations per request
tip.74: Set {highlight}"tools": {"bash": false}{/highlight} to disable specific tools
tip.75: Set {highlight}"mcp_*": false{/highlight} to disable all tools from an MCP server
tip.76: Override global tool settings per agent configuration
tip.77: Permission {highlight}doom_loop{/highlight} prevents infinite tool call loops
tip.79: Run {highlight}deveco debug config{/highlight} to troubleshoot configuration
tip.80: Use {highlight}--print-logs{/highlight} flag to see detailed logs in stderr
tip.82: to toggle code block visibility in messages
tip.84: Enable {highlight}scroll_acceleration{/highlight} in {highlight}tui.json{/highlight} for smooth macOS-style scrolling
tip.85: Toggle username display in chat via the command palette ({highlight}{{key}}{/highlight})
tip.85_plain: Toggle username display in chat via the command palette
tip.86: Use {highlight}/connect{/highlight} to add API keys for supported LLM providers
tip.87: Commit your project's {highlight}AGENTS.md{/highlight} file to Git for team sharing
tip.88: Use {highlight}/review{/highlight} to review uncommitted changes, branches, or PRs
tip.89: to open the DevEco Code user guide
tip.90: Use {highlight}/rename{/highlight} to rename the current session
tip.91: to undo changes in your prompt
tip.92: to suspend the terminal and return to your shell
